EDUCATION

• Percentage : 93.6 (Science with Mathematics)  
Kendriya  Vidyalaya Bailey Road | Secondary School Examination, CBSE          Patna,  IN | 10/2019  - 06/2020  
• Percentage : 92.6   
SKILLS   
• Languages : C, C++, Java, Python, R  
• Developer Tools : Visual Studio, Visual Studio Code, Git & GitHub  
• Soft Skills : Problem Solving, Communication Skill, Teamwork , Leadership, Adaptability  
• Coursework : Data Structures & Algorithms in C, Computational Theory, DBMS, Operating Systems  
• Communication: English (Proficient), Hindi (Fluent), Kannada (Basic)  
PROJECTS  
• AI Report Generating Agent                                                      2024  
~  Developed an AI -powered report -generating agent leveraging Llama and full -stack development.  
− Tools & Technologies Used: Python, Llama, React.js, Flask, MongoDB  
− Developed an AI -powered report -generating agent using Python, Llama, React.js, Flask, and MongoDB. This application dynamically generates reports from struc tured and 
unstructured data based on natural language queries, integrating with various APIs and data bases.  It efficiently processes large datasets and exports customizable reports 
in formats like PDF, complete with rich visualizations. This project highlights my proficiency in AI/ML and web development, as well as my ability to deliver comprehensive, 
data-driven solutions . 
− Qualified to the Semi -Finals of the 100x Engineers Buildathon 2024  
• NoteRIT Branch Portal Development                2024  
~  Collaborated on creating NoteRIT , a centrali sed study  platform for the AI & Data Science and AI & Machine Learning departments . 
− Tools & Technologies : React.js, Vercel, Google Drive  
− I compiled and organi sed academic resources into a structured Google Drive repository, ensuring easy access and management. These 
resources were then seamlessly integrated into the website, providing users with a central ised location for all departmental materials. 
Additionally, I assisted in designing an intuitive user interface to enhance user experience and deployed the application usi ng Vercel for 
optimal performance and accessibility.  
INTERESTS  
• Technical : DSA, Web Development, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science  
• Football Enthusiast : Indian Football, Bengaluru FC, Sunil Chhetri  
• Playing Football : Holding Midfielder  
• Position : Core Member of  the North End Blues, Official Fanclub of Bengaluru FC

PROJECTS
Heart disease prediction  ↗ 
Aug 2024 - Sep 2024
Heart Disease Prediction System Using Machine Learning
This project aims to predict the likelihood of heart disease based
on various health metrics input by the user. Using a user-friendly
interface built with Streamlit, users can enter data such as age,
sex, cholesterol levels, and more. The system processes this
input and utilizes a Random Forest Classifier (built using Scikit-
Learn) to assess the risk of heart disease.
Key features include:
A clean and intuitive UI for health data input.
Real-time prediction using a pre-trained machine learning model.
Seamless integration of data preprocessing and model inference.
Technologies used: Python, Streamlit, Scikit-Learn, Pandas,
Joblib, and NumPy.
This project enhances the understanding of cardiovascular risk
factors and demonstrates the practical application of predictive
models in healthcare.Parkinson's Episode Prediction System  ↗ 
Mar 2024 - Jun 2024
Developed an AI system to predict the off episodes of
Parkinson's disease based on parameters like Alpha synuclein
dopamine and sp02
